description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a UnitTest job that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs before_script commands: wget -q -O - https://dl-ssl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | apt-key add, echo "deb http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google.list, pip install -r requirements.txt, python manage.py makemigrations, python manage.py migrate, apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq unzip, apt-get install -y google-chrome-stable, apt-get install -y xvfb, wget https://chromedriver.storage.googleapis.com/2.32/chromedriver_linux64.zip, unzip chromedriver_linux64.zip, python manage.py collectstatic --no-input, python manage.py runserver 8000 &, then script commands: coverage run --include='lab_*/*' manage.py test and coverage report -m, and runs on_success. In the deploy stage add a Deployment job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, runs before_script commands: gem install dpl and wget -qO- https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh, then script commands: dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, export HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME python manage.py migrate, and sets the environment to production with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST. No caches, artifacts, or additional rules are defined.
